commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl -n yanxi-validation run uccl-probe --rm -i --restart=Never --image=788668107894.dkr.ecr.us-east-2.amazonaws.com/yanxi/uccl-ep:v2 --overrides={"spec":{"tolerations":[{"key":"nvidia.com/gpu","operator":"Equal","value":"true","effect":"NoSchedule"}],"containers":[{"name":"x","image":"788668107894.dkr.ecr.us-east-2.amazonaws.com/yanxi/uccl-ep:v2","command":["bash","-c","find /opt/uccl -name test_*.py -o -name test_internode* -o -name test_low_latency* 2>/dev/null | head -20; echo ---; ls /opt/uccl/ep/ 2>&1; echo ---; python -c import uccl.ep 2>&1 || python3 -c import uccl 2>&1; echo ---; python3 -c \"import uccl.ep as ep; print(dir(ep))\" 2>&1"]}]}} 2>&1 | tail -40'
